query:
SELECT EXISTS(
                    SELECT 1
                    FROM notificaciones
                    WHERE usuario_id = $1
                      AND tipo = $2
                                            AND created_at > NOW() - ($3::int4 * INTERVAL '1 second')
                      AND (($4::int4 IS NULL AND actor_id IS NULL) OR actor_id = $4)
                      AND ($5::jsonb IS NULL OR datos = $5)
                ) AS "exists!"
